# Titanium Edge Credit Card
Sourcing of this Credit Card has been stopped. Existing customers of this card will continue to enjoy the benefits.

![ads-block-img](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Card Benefits and Features
### Banking Benefits
  * Get Up to 50 days of interest-free credit period from the date of purchase.
  * 100% fuel surcharge waiver
  * (Maximum waiver of ₹250 per statement cycle)
  * Enjoy Revolving Credit at nominal interest rate


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/titanium-edge-credit-card "View More")
![Titanium Edge Crdeit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Reward Point Benefits
  * 100 Reward Points = ₹ 10 for CashBack redemption against outstanding Credit Card amount.
  * 2 Reward Points for every ₹ 200 spent
  * 50% more Reward Points on Dining expenses


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/titanium-edge-credit-card "View More")
![Titanium Edge Crdeit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Card Management Benefits
  * Protect yourself against fraud with the EMV Chip technology in your card
  * Get zero liability on lost card if reported immediately


![Titanium Edge Crdeit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Know more about the card
  1. ### MyCards
  2. ### Fees and Charges
  3. ### Credit and Safety
  4. ### More Rewards with PayZapp
  5. ### Contactless Payment
  6. ### Most Important Terms and Conditions


###  MyCards 
[MyCards(opens in a new tab)](https://mycards.hdfcbank.com/)**,** a mobile-based service platform for all Credit Card needs, facilitates convenient activation and management of your Regalia Gold Credit Card on the go. It ensures a seamless experience without the need for passwords or downloads.
  * Credit Card Registration and Activation
  * Set up your Card PIN
  * Manage Card Controls like Online Spends, Contactless Transactions
  * View Transactions / Download e-Statements
  * Check Reward Points
  * Block/ Re-Issue Your Card
  * Apply for an Add-on Card, Manage, Set PIN and Card Controls for Add-on card


  * Single Interface  
One unified platform for Credit Cards, Debit Cards, FASTag and Consumer Durable Loans 
  * Spends tracking  
Simple interface to track all your spends
  * Reward Points  
View and redeem points at the push of a button


![Card Management & Controls](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Fees and Charges 
**Titanium Edge Credit Card Fees & Charges**
  * **Annual fee** : Membership renewal fee waiver on spending ₹50,000 within a year.
  * **Cash advance fee** of 2.5%, with a minimum of ₹500, is applied to all cash withdrawals.
  * **Interest** : 3.49% interest per month on any unpaid balance carried past the due date of the bill.


[Check Now](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/titanium-edge-credit-card/fees-and-charges)
![Fees and Charges](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Credit and Safety 
  * Revolving Credit is available at a nominal interest rate.  
  

    * (Check the ​[fees and charges](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/titanium-edge-credit-card/fees-and-charges) section for more details).
  * Get Up to 50 days of interest-free credit from the date of purchase.
  * The offer is subject to submission of the charge by the merchant.
  * Stay protected against unauthorised use when you shop anywhere with EMV Chip Card technology.
  * Zero liability for fraudulent transactions if reported immediately to HDFC Bank’s 24/7 Call Centre


![Credit and Safety](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  More Rewards with PayZapp 
  * Link your HDFC Bank Titanium Edge Credit Card on PayZapp
  * Extra CashBack and Reward Points on utility bills, mobile recharge and more.
  * Get ₹1,000 CashBack on shopping in-app over 200+ brands.
  * Securely pay without the hassle of OTPs with ‘Swipe to Pay’.


![More Rewards with PayZapp](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Contactless Payment 
  * The Titanium Edge Credit Card is enabled* for Contactless Payments at retail outlets.
  * *Note:
  * In India, contactless payments up to ₹5,000 don't require a PIN for a single transaction.
  * For amounts of ₹5,000 or more, the Cardholder must enter the Credit Card PIN.
  * You may check for the Contactless Network Symbol on your card.


![Contactless Payment](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Most Important Terms and Conditions 
  * The [Most Important Terms and Conditions(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/personal-mitc/mitc-in-english.pdf) for each of our banking offerings features all the specific terms and conditions that govern their use. You must go through it thoroughly to fully understand the terms and conditions applicable to any banking product you choose.


![Most Important Terms and Conditions](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)

##  Frequently Asked Questions 
###  What is a Titanium Edge Credit Card?
**Titanium Edge Credit Card** is a **premium metal card** that offers a range of rewards, benefits, and features designed to elevate your financial experience.
###  How to use the Titanium Edge Credit Card?
You can use the HDFC **Titanium Edge Credit Card** for various transactions like shopping, dining, travel bookings, and more. It offers rewards on specific categories, fuel surcharge waivers, and ​CashBack on certain transactions, making it a versatile card for everyday use.
###  Is the Titanium Edge Credit Card free?
While there may be an annual fee associated with the **Titanium Edge Credit Card,** it can be waived by meeting certain spending criteria. [Click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/titanium-edge-credit-card/fees-and-charges) for more details.
###  How to apply for the Titanium Edge Credit Card?
We are currently not accepting new applications for the HDFC Bank Titanium Edge Credit Card. However, you can explore a range of other Credit Cards that may suit your needs. Click [here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards) to view our available options and find the right card for you.
###  What are the benefits of the Titanium Edge Credit Card?
HDFC Bank’s **Titanium Edge Credit Card online** offers ​​CashBack, reward points, dining privileges, fuel surcharge waiver, EMV Chip technology for enhanced security, and more.
